nodes.label: VGGT Encoder
nodes.summary: Pre-trained pose-free MVS transformer, LoRA-tuned on Objaverse; outputs multi-layer features ϕ_vggt from layers 4/11/17/23.

nodes.label: Reconstruction Conditioning
nodes.summary: Condition Net (4 cross-attn blocks) distills VGGT features into Global Geometry Condition (GGC) + Per-View Conditions (PVC).

nodes.label: Coarse-to-Fine Generation
nodes.summary: TRELLIS SS Flow generates sparse voxels conditioned on GGC; SLAT Flow generates per-voxel latents conditioned on PVC.

nodes.label: Camera Pose Refinement
nodes.summary: VGGT estimates poses from 30 auxiliary views; refined via image-matching + PnP/RANSAC against partial-generation renders.

nodes.label: Velocity Compensation
nodes.summary: When t<0.5, decode SLAT to mesh, render from refined poses, compute SSIM+LPIPS+DreamSim loss, derive Δv added to next step.
